sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([4, 5, 6]));
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap_data = bitmapUnion(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([7])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapContains(bitmap_data, toUInt32(2)) AS contains_2 FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT id, bitmapContains(bitmap_data, toUInt32(4)) AS contains_4 FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 2;
